name: chain_saaspocalypse_300b_saas_value_wiped_d
method: SaaSpocalypse: $300B SaaS value wiped. Default CRUD+SEO moat dead. Teams shipping fast with AI still winning (Cursor $1B ARR in 24mo). Opportunity: position against incumbent SaaS with cheaper, faster

stages.task: Scrape G2 1-2 star reviews, Reddit r/SaaS r/smallbusiness r/Entrepreneur complaint threads, HN 'Show HN' competitor failures for SaaS with >$50/mo pricing and recurring complaints about bloat/cost/complexity
Score each target: pricing gap (their price vs what a lean alternative costs), complaint volume, market size estimate, build complexity (can App Factory ship in <48hrs?). Filter to top 5 per week.
Generate App Factory spec: core 3-5 features only (not feature parity), Stripe payment link, landing page copy positioning as 'the simple alternative to X'. Queue into app_factory_command_center.py
Generate 3 tweets + 1 thread per build: 'Company X charges $99/mo for what takes 200 lines of code. We built the alternative in 48 hours.' Route to engagement_bait_converter.py
